summary: Migrate Twining condition from raw MCP server to plugin-compatible configuration
context: The benchmark harness configured Twining as a raw MCP server with inline CLAUDE.md docs (~300 lines), old tool prefix mcp__twining__, and TWINING_DATA_DIR env var. Twining is now distributed as a Claude Code plugin with skills, hooks, and its own .mcp.json.
rationale: Align benchmark condition with how Twining is actually deployed as a plugin: use --project flag for isolation (matching plugin .mcp.json pattern), plugin tool prefix mcp__plugin_twining_twining__, and concise CLAUDE.md pointing to twining:* skills instead of embedding all documentation inline.

alternatives.option: Keep raw MCP server config unchanged, only update tool prefixes
alternatives.reason_rejected: Would diverge from how real users configure Twining via plugin, making benchmark results less representative

alternatives.option: Remove MCP server config entirely and rely on plugin installation
alternatives.reason_rejected: Benchmark needs explicit control over isolation (--project per run) and dashboard disabling, which plugin auto-config doesn't support
